Who We Serve

Flexible options tailored
for every journey

No frills, no hidden fees — just reliable wheels at honest prices. Perfect for students, workers, and families who need a car that gets the job done.

🎓

Students & Budget Travellers

Affordable economy cars that won't break the bank. Get from A to B reliably without the premium price tag.

💼

Working Professionals

Dependable daily wheels kept in good condition. Fuel-efficient and practical for the daily commute.

👨‍👩‍👧‍👦

Families & Groups

Need more room? Our Toyota Hiace van fits the whole crew plus the luggage — perfect for bigger adventures.

Don't hesitate — message us today and find the right car for your journey.

What's Included

Everything you need,
nothing you don't

Every Mate To Go rental is straightforward and stress-free from pickup to drop-off.

🛡️

Trusted Insurance

Major insurance providers help keep you covered while you're on the road, so you can drive with peace of mind and focus on a safe journey.

📅

Rentals from 1 Month+

Rentals start from a minimum of 1 month, making it the ideal solution for long-term travel, work, or everyday driving needs.

🔧

Roadside Assistance

Peace of mind on every journey. Roadside support available should you need it.

📍

Brisbane Pickup & Drop-off

Convenient collection and return in Brisbane. Easy, fast, and hassle-free.

How It Works

On the road in three
simple steps

Getting started with Mate To Go is quick. No complicated paperwork, no long queues — just message us on WhatsApp.

1

Choose Your Vehicle

Browse our fleet and pick the category that fits your trip and budget.

2

Message Us on WhatsApp

Send us your dates and preferred vehicle. We'll get back to you fast.

3

Confirm & Drive

We'll confirm your booking and sort the details. Just show up and grab the keys.
